steps.title: Track the cause of uniqueness
steps.content: The passage explains that New Mexico's distance from other Spanish colonial population centers limited exposure to later changes in Spanish grammar and vocabulary. That isolation helps explain why the dialect retained older features.

steps.title: Link isolation to language change
steps.content: A is about other languages, which the passage does not discuss. B ignores the role of isolation. D concerns mutual understanding between dialect speakers, which is not addressed. The completion about geographical isolation shaping language development follows from the passage. The answer is C.
